═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         GITHUB WORKFLOWS - SIMPLIFIED & FIXED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

BEFORE (Confusing):
  ❌ 3 workflows doing similar things
  ❌ deploy.yml and deploy-codebuild.yml both exist
  ❌ Unclear which one runs when
  ❌ Duplicate code everywhere

AFTER (Clear):
  ✅ 2 workflows with clear purposes
  ✅ ci.yml - Quality checks only
  ✅ deploy.yml - Build & deploy only
  ✅ No duplication

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

WORKFLOW 1: CI (Quality Checks)
  File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
  Runs: Every push & PR
  Does: Lint → Type Check → Build → Security Audit
  Time: ~2-3 minutes
  Purpose: Fast feedback, no deployment

WORKFLOW 2: CD (Deployment)  
  File: .github/workflows/deploy.yml
  Runs: Push to main/dev OR manual trigger
  Does: CodeBuild (build Docker) → Terraform (deploy)
  Time: ~6-8 minutes
  Purpose: Deploy to AWS App Runner

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

BRANCH → ENVIRONMENT:
  dev  → Staging (auto-deploy)
  main → Production (auto-deploy)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

DOCUMENTATION:
  📖 Quick Start:    .github/QUICK_START.md
  📚 Full Guide:     .github/WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md
  📋 Reference:      .github/workflows/README.md

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
